home.name: Settlement
home.description: Your court, ruler, and settlement buildings.

black_forest.name: Black Forest
black_forest.description: A wet forest beyond the palisade. The first dangerous expeditions begin here.

old_kurgan.name: Old Kurgan
old_kurgan.description: A dead hill with ancient marks and an ill reputation.

dry_ford.name: Dry Ford
dry_ford.description: A shallow path across the old river. Useful for scouting.

neighbor_1.name: Northern neighbor
neighbor_1.description: A nearby kingdom still hidden in the mist.

neighbor_2.name: Southern neighbor
neighbor_2.description: A distant kingdom still hidden in the mist.

patron_road.name: Envoy Road
patron_road.description: Envoys, tribute collectors, and foreign promises arrive by this road.

omens.name: Dark Omens
omens.description: Rumors, news, and troubling choices gather over the settlement.
